StudentCtl is a REST controller for managing student-related operations.

Data Access Object implementation for StudentDTO entities.

StudentDAOInt - Interface in com.rays.dao
Data Access Object interface for StudentDTO entities.
StudentDTO - Class in com.rays.dto
StudentDTO represents a student entity in the system.
StudentDTO() - Constructor for class com.rays.dto.StudentDTO
 
StudentForm - Class in com.rays.form
StudentForm is a form class used for capturing and transferring student-related data from the presentation layer to the business layer.
StudentForm() - Constructor for class com.rays.form.StudentForm
 
studentId - Variable in class com.rays.dto.MarksheetDTO
ID of the student associated with this marksheet
studentId - Variable in class com.rays.form.MarksheetForm
Student ID (required, min value 1)
studentService - Variable in class com.rays.ctl.MarksheetCtl
 
StudentServiceImpl - Class in com.rays.service
StudentServiceImpl provides the implementation of StudentServiceInt interface.
StudentServiceImpl() - Constructor for class com.rays.service.StudentServiceImpl
 
StudentServiceInt - Interface in com.rays.service
StudentServiceInt is an interface that defines business operations for StudentDTO objects.
subject - Variable in class com.rays.email.EmailMessage
Subject of the email

subjectId - Variable in class com.rays.form.TimeTableForm
ID of the subject (required, must be >= 1)

subjectName - Variable in class com.rays.dto.TimeTableDTO
Subject name associated with the timetable entry

subjectName - Variable in class com.rays.form.TimeTableForm
